lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਹੇ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਹੇ ਦਇਆਲ ਲਾਲ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: he gobind he gopaal he deaal laal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Lord of the Universe, O Lord of the World, O Dear Merciful Beloved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਨਾਥ ਅਨਾਥ ਸਖੇ ਦੀਨ ਦਰਦ ਨਿਵਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: praan naath anaath sakhe deen darad nivaar |1|
lines.english: You are the Master of the breath of life, the Companion of the lost and forsaken, the Destroyer of the pains of the poor. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Malaar, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਸਮ੍ਰਥ ਅਗਮ ਪੂਰਨ ਮੋਹਿ ਮਇਆ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: he samrath agam pooran mohi meaa dhaar |2|
lines.english: O All-powerful, Inaccessible, Perfect Lord, please shower me with Your Mercy. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧ ਕੂਪ ਮਹਾ ਭਇਆਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰ ॥੩॥੮॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: andh koop mahaa bheaan naanak paar utaar |3|8|30|
lines.english: Please, carry Nanak across the terrible, deep dark pit of the world to the other side. ||3||8||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 1 asattapadeea ghar 1 |
lines.english: Malaar, First Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਕਵੀ ਨੈਨ ਨਂ‍ੀਦ ਨਹਿ ਚਾਹੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਿਰ ਨਂ‍ੀਦ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: chakavee nain naneed neh chaahai bin pir naneed na paaee |
lines.english: The chakvi bird does not long for sleepy eyes; without her beloved, she does not sleep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਰੁ ਚਰ੍ਹੈ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਦੇਖੈ ਨੈਨੀ ਨਿਵਿ ਨਿਵਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਪਾਂਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: soor charhai priau dekhai nainee niv niv laagai paanee |1|
lines.english: When the sun rises, she sees her beloved with her eyes; she bows and touches his feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਭਾਵੈ ਪ੍ਰੇਮੁ ਸਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: pir bhaavai prem sakhaaee |
lines.english: The Love of my Beloved is pleasing; it is my Companion and Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੜੀ ਨਹੀ ਜਗਿ ਜੀਵਾ ਐਸੀ ਪਿਆਸ ਤਿਸਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin gharree nahee jag jeevaa aisee piaas tisaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without Him, I cannot live in this world even for an instant; such is my hunger and thirst. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਵਰਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਕਿਰਣਿ ਆਕਾਸੀ ਬਿਗਸੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: saravar kamal kiran aakaasee bigasai sehaj subhaaee |
lines.english: The lotus in the pool blossoms forth intuitively and naturally, with the rays of the sun in the sky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਬਨੀ ਅਭ ਐਸੀ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: preetam preet banee abh aisee jotee jot milaaee |2|
lines.english: Such is the love for my Beloved which imbues me; my light has merged into the Light. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਤ੍ਰਿਕੁ ਜਲ ਬਿਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਟੇਰੈ ਬਿਲਪ ਕਰੈ ਬਿਲਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: chaatrik jal bin priau priau tterai bilap karai bilalaaee |
lines.english: Without water, the rainbird cries out, "Pri-o! Pri-o! - Beloved! Beloved!" It cries and wails and laments.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਨਹਰ ਘੋਰ ਦਸੌ ਦਿਸਿ ਬਰਸੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਜਲ ਪਿਆਸ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ghanahar ghor dasau dis barasai bin jal piaas na jaaee |3|
lines.english: The thundering clouds rain down in the ten directions; its thirst is not quenched until it catches the rain-drop in its mouth. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੀਨ ਨਿਵਾਸ ਉਪਜੈ ਜਲ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਸੁਖ ਦੁਖ ਪੁਰਬਿ ਕਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: meen nivaas upajai jal hee te sukh dukh purab kamaaee |
lines.english: The fish lives in water, from which it was born. It finds peace and pleasure according to its past actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਵਾਂਢੀ ਪਿਰੁ ਦੇਸ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਸਚੇ ਗੁਰ ਪਹਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਠਾਈਁ ॥
lines.translit: dhan vaandtee pir des nivaasee sache gur peh sabad patthaaee |
lines.english: The soul-bride is separated from her Husband Lord, who lives in His Own Country. He sends the Shabad, His Word, through the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਰਹਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਪਲੁ ਜਲ ਬਿਨੁ ਮਰਨੁ ਜੀਵਨੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਤਾਂਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: khin til reh na sakai pal jal bin maran jeevan tis taanee |4|
lines.english: It cannot survive without water for a moment, even for an instant. Life and death depend on it. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਕਰੈ ਸਭੈ ਹੈ ਜੇਤੀ ਗੁਰ ਭਾਵੈ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਪਾਈਁ ॥
lines.translit: priau priau karai sabhai hai jetee gur bhaavai priau paaee |
lines.english: Everyone cries out, "Beloved! Beloved!" But she alone finds her Beloved, who is pleasing to the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਰਤੀ ਹਰਖਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gun sangreh prabh ridai nivaasee bhagat ratee harakhaaee |5|
lines.english: She gathers virtues, and enshrines God within her heart. Imbued with devotion, she is happy. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਨਾਲੇ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸਚਿ ਸੰਗੇ ਨਦਰੀ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: priau naale sad hee sach sange nadaree mel milaaee |6|
lines.english: Our Beloved is always with us; through the Truth, He blesses us with His Grace, and unites us in His Union. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਪਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad ghar hee paragaasiaa sahaje sehaj samaaee |7|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, He is revealed within the home of my heart; I am intuitively, naturally, absorbed into Him. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਜੀਉ ਜੀਉ ਹੈ ਸੋਈ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh meh jeeo jeeo hai soee ghatt ghatt rahiaa samaaee |
lines.english: He is the life of the soul in each and every soul; He permeates and pervades each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨਾ ਕਾਜੁ ਸਵਾਰਹੁ ਆਪੇ ਸੁਖਦਾਤੇ ਗੋਸਾਂਈਁ ॥
lines.translit: apanaa kaaj savaarahu aape sukhadaate gosaanee |
lines.english: He Himself shall resolve all your affairs, when you meet with the Giver of peace, the Lord of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਪਿਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਤਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਪਤਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad ghar hee pir paaeaa tau naanak tapat bujhaaee |8|1|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, you shall find your Husband Lord within your own home; then, O Nanak, the fire within you shall be quenched. ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Malaar, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਗਤੁ ਜਾਗਿ ਰਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਮੈ ਕੋ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaagat jaag rahai gur sevaa bin har mai ko naahee |
lines.english: Remain awake and aware, serving the Guru; except for the Lord, no one is mine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਜਤਨ ਕਰਿ ਰਹਣੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਆਚੁ ਕਾਚੁ ਢਰਿ ਪਾਂਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anik jatan kar rehan na paavai aach kaach dtar paanhee |1|
lines.english: Even by making all sorts of efforts, you shall not remain here; it shall melt like glass in the fire. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਤਨ ਧਨ ਕਾ ਕਹਹੁ ਗਰਬੁ ਕੈਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: eis tan dhan kaa kahahu garab kaisaa |
lines.english: Tell me - why are you so proud of your body and wealth?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਸਤ ਬਾਰ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਬਵਰੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਗਰਬਿ ਖਪੈ ਜਗੁ ਐਸਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: binasat baar na laagai bavare haumai garab khapai jag aisaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They shall vanish in an instant; O madman, this is how the world is wasting away, in egotism and pride. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਜਗਦੀਸ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਰਖਵਾਰੇ ਰਾਖੈ ਪਰਖੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jai jagadees prabhoo rakhavaare raakhai parakhai soee |
lines.english: Hail to the Lord of the Universe, God, our Saving Grace; He judges and saves the mortal beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੀ ਹੈ ਤੇਤੀ ਤੁਝ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਤੁਮੑ ਸਰਿ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jetee hai tetee tujh hee te tuma sar avar na koee |2|
lines.english: All that is, belongs to You. No one else is equal to You. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਰੁ ਅਨਾਥ ਸਰਬ ਸਿਰਿ ਮੋਰਾ ਕਾਲ ਬਿਕਾਲ ਭਰਮ ਭੈ ਖੰਜਨੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: amar anaath sarab sir moraa kaal bikaal bharam bhai khanjan |3|
lines.english: My Eternal, Unmastered Lord is over the heads of all. He is the Destroyer of death and rebirth, doubt and fear. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਉਪਾਇ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਵਸਿ ਕੀਨੀ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਜਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeea upaae jugat vas keenee aape guramukh anjan |
lines.english: Creating all beings and creatures, their ways and means are under Your control; You bless the Gurmukhs with the ointment of spiritual wisdom.
